Introduction
    Blessed with prophetic dreams, Ban Hua uses her gift to shield her family. Meanwhile, Rong Xia unravels mysteries surrounding his imperial roots. Their intertwining journeys lead to an unexpected love story.

Also known as: Ta Chính Là Cô Nương Như Vậy
